text: The best AI product starts with a use case that has clear value, clear constraints, and enough data to support iteration.
explanation: Good AI products are not defined by the model alone, but by the business problem they solve.
usage: Useful for product managers, founders, and AI strategy teams.
spanish: El mejor producto de IA comienza con un caso de uso que tenga claro valor, límites definidos y datos suficientes para iterar.

text: A strong ROI argument for AI combines cost savings, time savings, quality gains, and risk reduction in a realistic estimate.
explanation: Executive stakeholders often need a simple, credible business case rather than a purely technical pitch.
usage: Very relevant for leaders discussing AI investment and adoption.
spanish: Un argumento sólido de ROI para IA combina ahorros de costo, tiempo, mejora de calidad y reducción de riesgo en una estimación realista.

text: Adoption fails when users are not trained, supported, and given a clear reason to change their habits.
explanation: Technical excellence is not enough if the human side of change is ignored.
usage: Central for internal copilots, automation tools, and AI-assisted workflows.
spanish: La adopción fracasa cuando los usuarios no reciben capacitación, soporte y una razón clara para cambiar sus hábitos.

text: The best AI leaders explain trade-offs in plain language and connect the technology to business outcomes.
explanation: Communication is part of product strategy because AI systems often create uncertainty for non-technical stakeholders.
usage: Essential for product leads and managers working across functions.
spanish: Los mejores líderes de IA explican los compromisos en un lenguaje sencillo y conectan la tecnología con resultados de negocio.
